title: Connexion to SMTP server to send/receive mail for people who got their own server

posts.author: brianfromfrance (S)
posts.cookedHtml: It could be a great devellopment to connect SMTP server to Monday. For people who got their own server. Today we can only connect Gmail and Outlook. For people like me, I got my own server, we can’t use correctly all the automation around mails… Thanks to make a permission to connect our server to send/receive mail on Monday on SMTP
